title: 地点+时间错配：Paris claim vs London 2019 image context
current_caption: Protesters marched in Paris on Monday after a new climate policy.
true_image_context: Demonstrators gathered in London in 2019 during a climate protest.
demo_point: 展示 COVE-lite 用图片真实语境指出地点和时间冲突。

title: 正常匹配：体育新闻图文一致
current_caption: A football team celebrates after winning the cup in London in 2024.
true_image_context: A football team celebrates after winning the cup in London in 2024.
demo_point: 展示系统不会把字段一致样本强行解释成 OOC。

title: 主体错配：Obama claim vs Musk image context
current_caption: Barack Obama will meet officials in Beijing in 2024.
true_image_context: Elon Musk will meet officials in Beijing in 2024.
demo_point: 地点、时间、关系一致，但主体不同。

title: 事件类型错配：health claim vs sports true context
current_caption: A covid hospital opened in Paris in 2024.
true_image_context: A football match took place in Paris in 2024.
demo_point: 地点和时间一致，但事件类型冲突。

title: 关系错配：attack claim vs meet context
current_caption: Soldiers attacked a convoy in Ukraine in 2024.
true_image_context: Soldiers met a convoy in Ukraine in 2024.
demo_point: 主体、地点、时间相同，但动作关系冲突。

title: 证据不足：没有图片真实语境
current_caption: A fire broke out in New York in 2024.
demo_point: 展示 evidence relevance/sufficiency gate：无证据时不强行解释。

title: 中文地点错配：北京 claim vs 上海 true context
demo_point: 展示中文地点字段抽取与冲突展示。

title: 多字段 Hard Negative：fire New York vs football London 2019
current_caption: A fire broke out in New York on Monday.
true_image_context: A football match took place in London in 2019.
demo_point: 展示 hard negative 下多个冲突字段同时输出。
